picks.excerpt: Aiarty Video Enhancer applies AI-driven denoising, detail reconstruction and 4K upscaling to restore low-resolution and legacy footage for modern production workflows. All processing runs locally, with no cloud upload required.

Adobe has signed an agreement to acquire Topaz Labs, bringing its Emmy Award-winning AI video and image enhancement technology - upscaling, sharpening, frame interpolation, noise removal and footage restoration - in-house, while keeping Topaz products available as standalone tools.
